title: Full website audit
do: Identify website type and business goal before scoring.
Separate P0 blockers from optimization work.
dont: Do not hallucinate crawl, performance, ranking, or analytics data.
Do not treat all SEO issues equally.
Do not recommend ecommerce, local, or international actions when not applicable.

title: Audit important page types separately
do: Check homepage, service, product, category, blog, pricing, contact, and legal pages where provided.
dont: Do not apply one-page findings to the whole site unless evidence supports it.
Do not assume missing pages are broken unless input proves they exist.
